level_limits.note: Fighter limit can be extended based on STR: 17=8th, 18=9th, 18/50+=10th. MU limit based on INT: 18=12th, 19+=unlimited.

sleep_charm_resistance.description: 90% resistant to sleep and charm spells.

secret_door_detection.description: When passing within 10' of a concealed door, the elf has a 1 in 6 chance of noticing it. If actively searching: 1 in 6 for concealed doors, 2 in 6 for secret doors.

bow_bonus.description: +1 to hit with bows (not crossbows) and short/long swords.

surprise_bonus.description: If the elf is alone, not in metal armor, and 90+ feet from the party, or with a party of elves/halflings, they move silently and surprise on 4 in 6.
surprise_bonus.conditions: alone or with elves/halflings, not in metal armor

multi_class.description: Elves may combine classes. Experience is divided evenly between classes. Hit points are averaged.
